name: HDR Mov
desc: Reencode HDR videos to be compatible with Mac
cmd: ffmpeg -hwaccel auto -y -i {input} -c:v hevc_videotoolbox -profile:v main10 -pix_fmt p010le -b:v 10M -color_primaries bt2020 -color_trc smpte2084 -colorspace bt2020nc -color_range tv  -metadata:s:v:0 master-display="G(13250,34500)B(7500,3000)R(34000,16000)WP(15635,16450)L(10000000,1)" -movflags +faststart -tag:v hvc1 -c:a eac3 -b:a 640k -af "channelmap=channel_layout=5.1" -sn {output}
